code: import api from'./api';export const authService={async login(email,password){const response=await api.post('/login',{email,password});return response.data;},getRole(){return localStorage.getItem('admin_role');},getEmail(){return localStorage.getItem('admin_email');},isAdmin(){return localStorage.getItem('admin_role')==='ROLE_ADMIN';},setAuth(role,email){localStorage.setItem('admin_role',role);localStorage.setItem('admin_email',email);},logout(){localStorage.removeItem('admin_role');localStorage.removeItem('admin_email');},isAuthenticated(){return!!localStorage.getItem('admin_role');}};export default authService;
